text: Subah mobile pe EMI bounce ka message dekhte hi meri aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur main bacchon ke samne hi rone lagi. Mummy ke kidney treatment ne MNC ki saari savings wipe out kar di hain aur ab dimaag bilkul blank hai, main kitchen ka kaam bhi nahi kar paa rahi. Is waqt mujhe koi insurance claim ya bank se baat karne ka raasta nahi sujh raha, bas ek gehra panic hai jo mujhe duba raha hai.

Bank ka notification dekh kar mera dum ghutne laga hai kyunki maine bacchon ki FD aur apni shaadi ka bacha-kucha sona tak bech diya tha hospital ka karz chukane ke liye. Divorced hone ki wajah se neighborhood shame pehle hi bohot thi, ab is zillat mein main bilkul toot gayi hoon aur mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe koi solution nahi dikh raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai.

Medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai aur aaj kist bounce hone par main bas sunn hokar deewar ko takti rahi. Gaon mein kisan bhai ki chit fund wali savings bhi Mummy ke operation mein khatam ho gayi, ye soch kar rone ka control nahi ho raha. Is waqt bacchon ka future ya agla kadam dimaag mein nahi aa raha, bas ek gehra despair hai jo mujhe saans nahi lene de raha.

Aaj bank se call aaya ki loan default ho gaya hai aur main wahi darwaze pe baith gayi, mujhse bacchon se nazrein milayi bhi nahi ja rahi. Itni community exclusion ke baad ye naya hadsa dekh kar dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai aur bas ICU ke kharche dimaag mein ghoom rahe hain. Main koi financial help ya gold loan restructure nahi soch sakti, bas ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai.

Beti ke accident mein saari jama-poonji chali gayi aur ab bank ka bounce alert dekh kar mera dimaag poori tarah blast ho gaya hai. Sahukaar ka karz pehle se tha aur ab ye notification dekh kar main bilkul breakdown kar gayi hoon, bas rona aa raha hai. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas darr lag raha hai ki ab humein is ghar se bhi nikal diya jayega.
